zh.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent於1226年出生在英國英格蘭爾。她和Johnathon Agden至少有1個兒子。她去世於1283年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent于1226年出生在英国英格兰爾。她和Johnathon Agden至少有1个儿子。她去世于1283年在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living on the banks of any of several rivers so called, but principally principally from the village of Trent in Dorset, which takes its name from the Trent Brook, a tributary of the River Yeo. The river name is of British origin and probably means ‘the trespasser, the river liable to floods’.

Scottish: possibly a habitational name from a shortened form of Tranent (Midlothian). The placename is of British origin and means ‘village of the streams’ (compare Welsh tref ‘homestead, village’ + neint ‘streams’).

variants.name: Tarrant
meanings: English (mainly Hampshire and Wiltshire): habitational name from any of the eight places in Dorset named from the River Tarrant. The river name is of British origin and probably means ‘the trespasser, the river liable to floods’; see   Trent  .
Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Toráin ‘descendant of Torán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of tor ‘lord, hero, or champion’. See Torrens .

variants.name: Maud
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent was born in 1226, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Johnathon Agden. She died in 1283, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent est née en 1226, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Johnathon Agden. Elle est décédée en 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent wurde 1226 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Johnathon Agden mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1283 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent è nata il nel 1226 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Johnathon Agden. Morì nel 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Cheshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent(은)는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Johnathon Agden(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent nasceu em 1226, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Johnathon Agden. Ela faleceu em 1283, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent родилась в 1226 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Johnathon Agden. Она умерла в 1283 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mathilda Trent nació en 1226, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Johnathon Agden. Murió en 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
